hero.title: EU AI Act Compliance Toolkit
hero.subtitle: Open-source tools for navigating Regulation (EU) 2024/1689
hero.description: Classify your AI system's risk tier, track compliance obligations, generate documentation, and stay ahead of enforcement deadlines.

dashboard.title: Compliance Dashboard
dashboard.description: Unified view of your AI system's compliance posture — checklist progress, gap analysis, penalty exposure, and enforcement deadlines.

classifier.title: Risk Classification
classifier.description: Interactive wizard to determine whether your AI system is prohibited, high-risk, GPAI, limited, or minimal risk under the EU AI Act.

checklists.title: Compliance Checklists
checklists.description: Tier-specific checklists with article references, evidence tracking, and exportable compliance reports.

timeline.title: Enforcement Timeline
timeline.description: Visual timeline of all EU AI Act enforcement dates — see what's in effect, upcoming, and future.

templates.title: Documentation Templates
templates.description: Generate conformity declarations, risk assessments, model cards, and transparency notices from pre-built templates.

examples.title: Worked Examples
examples.description: Real-world scenarios showing how the classification and compliance process works for different AI systems.

penalties.title: Penalty Calculator
penalties.description: Calculate maximum fine exposure based on your risk tier, organization type, and annual turnover under Article 99.

gaps.title: Gap Analysis
gaps.description: Identify compliance gaps, prioritize remediation actions, and track readiness against enforcement deadlines.

standards.title: Standards Mapping
standards.description: Browse ISO, CEN/CENELEC, and other harmonised standards mapped to EU AI Act requirements.

reports.title: Compliance Reports
reports.description: Generate comprehensive compliance reports combining classification, checklists, gap analysis, and penalty exposure.

classifier.title: AI System Risk Classifier
classifier.subtitle: Determine which EU AI Act risk tier applies to your AI system

prohibited.title: Prohibited Practices
prohibited.description: Check whether your AI system falls under Article 5 prohibited practices

gpai.title: General-Purpose AI
gpai.description: Determine if your system qualifies as a GPAI model

gpaiSystemic.title: Systemic Risk Assessment
gpaiSystemic.description: Assess whether your GPAI model poses systemic risk

highRisk.title: High-Risk Classification
highRisk.description: Check Annex I safety components and Annex III use cases

limited.title: Limited Risk (Transparency)
limited.description: Check transparency obligations for your AI system

prohibited.title: Prohibited AI System
prohibited.description: Your AI system is prohibited under Article 5 of the EU AI Act.
prohibited.action: Discontinue development or fundamentally redesign to remove prohibited capabilities.

highRisk.title: High-Risk AI System
highRisk.description: Your AI system is classified as high-risk. Extensive compliance obligations apply.
highRisk.action: Complete the high-risk compliance checklist and prepare technical documentation.

gpai.title: General-Purpose AI Model
gpai.description: Your model is classified as GPAI. Transparency and documentation obligations apply.
gpai.action: Complete the GPAI compliance checklist including model cards and training data documentation.

gpaiSystemic.title: GPAI with Systemic Risk
gpaiSystemic.description: Your model has systemic risk. Enhanced obligations apply.
gpaiSystemic.action: Complete the GPAI systemic risk checklist including adversarial testing and incident monitoring.

limited.title: Limited Risk AI System
limited.description: Transparency obligations apply. Users must be informed about AI interaction.
limited.action: Implement transparency measures: disclose AI interaction, label synthetic content.

minimal.title: Minimal Risk AI System
minimal.description: No mandatory obligations beyond existing law. Voluntary codes of conduct encouraged.
minimal.action: Consider adopting voluntary codes of conduct for trustworthy AI.

checklists.title: Compliance Checklists
checklists.subtitle: Track your EU AI Act compliance obligations

timeline.title: Enforcement Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Key dates for EU AI Act compliance

templates.title: Documentation Templates
templates.subtitle: Generate compliance documentation from pre-built templates

conformity.title: EU Declaration of Conformity
conformity.description: Required declaration for high-risk AI systems per Article 47 and Annex V.

riskAssessment.title: Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment
riskAssessment.description: Required assessment for high-risk AI systems deployed by public bodies per Article 27.

modelCard.title: GPAI Model Card
modelCard.description: Technical documentation for GPAI models per Article 53 and Annex XI.

impactAssessment.title: Data Protection Impact Assessment
impactAssessment.description: DPIA template for AI systems processing personal data, aligned with GDPR Article 35.

transparencyNotice.title: Transparency Notice
transparencyNotice.description: User-facing notice for AI systems with transparency obligations per Article 50.

examples.title: Worked Examples
examples.subtitle: See how the EU AI Act applies to real-world AI systems

footer.description: Open-source EU AI Act compliance toolkit. Built for developers, compliance teams, and legal professionals.
footer.copyright: EU AI Act Toolkit. Open source under MIT License.
footer.regulation: Based on Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 of the European Parliament and of the Council.
footer.tagline: Made with care for AI compliance teams worldwide

disclaimer.short: This tool does not constitute legal advice.
disclaimer.full: This tool does not constitute legal advice. Consult qualified legal counsel for compliance decisions. The EU AI Act Toolkit is an open-source project and is not affiliated with the European Union or any EU institution.

articles.title: EU AI Act Articles
articles.subtitle: Browse and search all articles of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689

penalties.title: Penalty Exposure
penalties.subtitle: Understand the financial consequences of non-compliance with the EU AI Act

calculator.title: Penalty Calculator
calculator.description: Calculate your organization's maximum penalty exposure based on risk tier, organization type, and annual turnover.

overview.title: EU AI Act Penalty Tiers
overview.description: All penalty categories defined in Article 99 of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689.

gaps.title: Compliance Gap Analysis
gaps.subtitle: Identify and prioritize compliance gaps for your AI system

standards.title: Harmonised Standards
standards.subtitle: ISO, CEN/CENELEC, and other standards mapped to EU AI Act requirements

reports.title: Compliance Report Generator
reports.subtitle: Generate a comprehensive compliance report combining classification, checklists, penalties, and gap analysis

form.title: Report Configuration
form.description: Provide details about your AI system to generate a tailored compliance report.

dashboard.title: Compliance Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your AI system's compliance posture at a glance

empty.title: No Classification Yet
empty.description: Classify your AI system to see your compliance dashboard with checklist progress, gap analysis, penalty exposure, and enforcement deadlines.

dashboard.disclaimer: This dashboard does not constitute legal advice. Consult qualified legal counsel for compliance decisions.
